title: Google Launches New DSP Feature For Retail Media Buyers
summary: The new programmatic capability lets retail media buyers tap first-party data across DSP campaigns.
content: Google announced a new DSP feature aimed at retail media buyers. The capability integrates first-party retailer data into programmatic campaigns, with early testers reporting a 12% lift in ROAS.

title: CTV Measurement Fight Heats Up As Nielsen Rivals Gain Ground
summary: Alternative currencies keep winning CTV measurement deals; Nielsen responds with a new panel product.
content: The connected TV measurement market is fragmenting. VideoAmp and iSpot signed new network deals this quarter, while Nielsen announced an expanded panel. Buyers say multi-currency workflows raise costs.

title: Sneaker Brand Scores With Star Athlete In New Sport Ads Push
summary: A celebrity-led creative campaign for the new sneaker line debuts during the finals.
content: The sneaker maker unveiled a celebrity campaign timed to the championship series.

title: Ad Industry Roundup: Google; Meta; Amazon; TikTok Moves
summary: A weekly roundup of platform news.

title: Chrome Privacy Sandbox Update Shifts Cookie Deprecation Timeline Again
summary: Google updated its Privacy Sandbox roadmap; attribution and measurement vendors reassess plans.
content: Google published another update to the Privacy Sandbox timeline. Measurement and attribution vendors said the shift changes their 2027 roadmaps, while advertisers keep testing cookieless targeting.
